environment_prompt: A vast golden wheat field at sunset. Sun setting behind distant mountains with warm golden light. A small dark wooden barn to the right. Tall wheat grass swaying gently. Clear sky fading to orange at the horizon. Beyond the visible field, a dirt farm track leads toward the barn where a tractor could approach from. The open terrain allows wind gusts to sweep unobstructed across the entire field, bending the wheat uniformly from one direction.
perspective_prompt: First-person perspective, standing eye-level view looking across the wheat field toward the setting sun and mountains.

interactions.action: A red tractor drives through the wheat field, approaching slowly.
A strong gust of wind sweeps across the field, causing the wheat stalks to sway violently.
